title: messages: PaymentAction::Request allows amount_zatoshi=0; zero-value payment not rejected
description: PaymentAction::Request { amount_zatoshi: u64 } has no minimum value check. A sender can request a payment of 0 zatoshi. The payee will generate a receive address and the payer can broadcast a zero-value transaction. This creates: (1) a state machine that reaches Confirmed on a worthless payment, (2) potential for dust-level transaction spam. The protocol should reject amount_zatoshi == 0 at deserialization, analogous to how total_chunks == 0 is rejected for FileHeader.
